<features>
- observable feature: flower has deep red petals
- observable feature: flower has a dark central throat
- observable feature: flower has a cup-like shape
</features>
<kb>
- IF [flower has deep red petals AND flower has a dark central throat AND flower has a cup-like shape] THEN [87]
- IF [flower has a pinkish-purple inflorescence AND spiky bracts] THEN [92]
- IF [flower has bright yellow petals AND three distinct upright petals AND three drooping petals] THEN [14]
</kb>
<rule_check>
- Rule 1 fires because the Query Image shows a flower with deep red petals, a dark central throat, and a cup-like shape, which matches the features of class 87.
</rule_check>
<response>87</response>

- observable feature: flower has a tall, spiky, pink inflorescence
- observable feature: flower has a small, purple, star-shaped bloom at the base of the spiky structure
- observable feature: background is dark, emphasizing the flower
</features>
<kb>
- IF [flower has a tall, spiky, pink inflorescence AND a small, purple, star-shaped bloom at its base] THEN [92]
- IF [flower is yellow with three distinct petals and a prominent central fall petal] THEN [14]
- IF [flower is pink with cup-shaped petals and a prominent central tube] THEN [87]
</kb>
<rule_check>
- Rule 1 fires because the Query Image shows a tall, spiky, pink inflorescence with a small, purple, star-shaped bloom at its base, which matches the description for class 92.
</rule_check>
<response>92</response>
